title: SAMSUNG Galaxy Buds4 Pro Wireless Bluetooth Noise-Cancelling Earbuds - Black

keySpecs.label: Battery life: Up to 7 hours (30 hours with case)

offers: Get 30% off Samsung Galaxy Buds4 and Buds4 Pro When Bought With any new Samsung S26 mobile phone

description.main: Enjoy clear, balanced sound with the Galaxy Buds4 Pro. Ultra-High Quality (UHQ) audio gives your favourite albums the space to shine, handling rich detail beautifully so you can pick up subtle layers you might've missed before. The two-way speakers with finely tuned tweeters and woofers make everything sounds fuller, punchier and more alive. Adaptive Noise Cancellation automatically adjusts to your surroundings, shutting out the external chatter and helping you focus on your playlist.
goodToKnow: Live Translate lets you receive real-time translations in 22 languages
Super wideband calling locks onto your voice to keep conversations crisp
The metal blade design houses responsive touch controls for volume and playback
The Galaxy Wearable app lets you customise controls, get updates and check battery levels
IP57 resistance is built to handle dust, splashes and downpours
